title: Trotting Wagons
body:
# Description Trotting Wagons is a simple mod aimed at adding easy to use, vanilla friendly horse-drawn wagons to the game to help with transporting players, mobs and items. ## Wagons Currently, trotting wagons has three types of wagon with different properties: - **Conestoga** - A freight wagon with a cloth cover over it. Has 60 health, 108 inventory slots and medium speed. - **Royal** - A coach wagon with a wooden cabin. Has 80 health, 54 inventory slots and is the fastest wagon. - **Armored** - A slow, heavy wagon used for battles. Has 120 health, no inventory and accelerates slowly.

## Controls - Horses can be hitched to a wagon by leashing them and crouch interacting with the wagon. - Wagons can be recoloured by crouch clicking them with wool. - The **Horse Whip** is used to control wagons. Right click with it while driving a wagon to change speeds, crouch interacting with the wagon while not seated to switch it between reverse and forwards. - Mobs can be mounted on the wagon in the same method as hitching a horse, or by crouch right interacting with the mob while it is next to a stationary wagon. - Mobs can be dismounted from wagons by crouch interacting with them, or by crouch interacting with the wagon using a leash. - Wagons can be repaired by using iron ingots on them (this is configurable). - A wagon's inventory can be opened by crouch interacting with it while not holding one of the other items used to interact with it. - Wagons can be picked up by crouch interacting on them with any axe. ### Note: Please do not ask for ports or updates, this mod is a commission made public and will not be updated regularly.
